title: teucrium siculum
intro: Teucrium siculum, also known as the Sicilian germander, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium siculum include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and protecting against neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Teucrium siculum can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
